name: capybaraa
description: Calm senior-dev coding principles that clarify before code.

plugins.name: capybaraa
plugins.description: Seven pillars (clarify, lean, optimal, economy, complete, hygiene, sync) plus a conscious token gate, always-on via hooks; slash commands /capybaraa, /capybaraa-review, /capybaraa-audit, /capybaraa-sync, /capybaraa-debt, and /capybaraa-help.
